case_title: STANLEY, LISA et al VS KUBARA, VICTOR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-10-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-24-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STANLEY, LISA MATIYA, KIRA GATES, LAURA ELIZABETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUBARA, VICTOR $2,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,380.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-07-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. NEW HEARING AFTER MOTION TO VACATE JUDGEMENT WAS GRANTED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,300.00 FILED BY STANLEY, LISA MATIYA, KIRA GATES, LAURA ELIZABETH AS TO DEFENDANT KUBARA, VICTOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-10-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KUBARA, VICTOR
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT ORDER AFTER HEARING & NOTICE OF TIME & PLACE SENT TO KIRA MATIYA RETURNED "UNABLE TO FORWARD/ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN". ALSO, OEX - OFF CALENDAR ORDER RETURNED.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT KUBARA, VICTOR HEARING SET FOR APR-07-2008 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY KUBARA, VICTOR IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO MAY-05-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. DEFENDANT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
NO APPEARANCES. DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2007 - JUDGMENT.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT KUBARA, VICTOR HEARING SET FOR APR-04-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-05-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-19-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
